problem_statement:
# Task: Assess the application

## Phase 1: Run core assessment
Use the 'assessment' skill to analyze the application and generate the assessment report.
This skill runs AppCAT (Application Continuity Analysis Tool) to detect migration issues.
Set `workspace-path` to `Microsoft.Diagnostics.Tracing/TraceEvent` so the assessment targets only that sub-directory.

**Note**: AI-powered analysis is disabled.
Skip Phase 2 (Architecture analysis) and Phase 3 (Fact gathering).
Only the AppCAT tool-based assessment report will be generated.

pull_request.title: [WIP] Run core assessment using AppCAT tool
